## Checklist

- [ ] `bun run lint` passes
- [ ] `bun run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `bun test` passes
- [ ] `bun run build` succeeds
- [ ] Tests added/updated for changes
- [ ] No breaking changes (or documented in PR)
